tool.title: Tool to invoke
enumTitles: package_details — fetch a PyPI package's metadata (optionally with recent releases)
download_stats — recent (day/week/month) or overall download counts
top_packages — top 30d or top 365d most-downloaded packages
tool.description: One tool per run. The Actor charges per tool call event.

args.title: Tool arguments
args.description: JSON args specific to the selected tool. See README.
